description: Matomo is a web analytics platform available as cloud-hosted and self-hosted software. It provides website tracking, reporting, and related analytics features, including WordPress and AI-assistant integrations.
summary: Matomo exposes tenant-hosted Reporting and Tracking HTTP APIs, a tenant-hosted MCP server, and a WordPress-specific REST API; authentication is primarily via per-user `token_auth`, with OAuth 2.0 also supported for reporting and MCP integrations.
